title: Claim Verification: Strengths of Allopathy vs. Ayurveda
summary: The claim is directly supported by the search results, which explicitly state that Allopathy excels in acute care and emergencies, while Ayurveda is often preferred for chronic, long-term health management, acknowledging that each system has its strengths depending on the health condition.
internet_data: Allopathy excels in acute care and emergencies, while Ayurveda is often preferred for chronic, long-term health management. Each system has its strengths depending on the health condition.
